ideation: This animation sequence depicts a snowman being built.  The robot starts with arms at its side, then scoops, then places, then pats the snowman. The final frame shows the robot admiring its work.  The movements are exaggerated for comedic effect.

frames.beat: arms rest at sides, ready to build
right arm scoops up imaginary snow
both arms raise and pat the new snow
right arm pats the snowman gently
